narrative:
New Franklin 1-B (precinct in Summit County) has 839 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
